Hello and thanks for the above info. Did you replace the coils, plugs and check the wiring/connector for any issues? If the ecu is having issues with this circuit it is because a part went bad and popped the ecu. These ecu's don't fail for this issue without an outside surge if that makes sense. Let us know when have a free moment. Thanks! YPS

Hello and thanks for purchasing our repair service, order 16-14473-23434

We look forward to receiving your part, repairing it, and then sending it back to you as quickly as possible! Before you do ship it in, please let us know the following information:

-The vehicle's Year/Make/Model/Engine
-A short description of the issue.
-The diagnostic trouble codes the vehicle is sending.
-Any parts that have been repaired or replaced in an attempt to fix the issue.

Please do not ship the part to us till we have this information as unfortunately not all parts are repairable. This is the reason we ask for so much information up front as we do have a diagnostic fee of $94.99 that we would refund you down to if the unit comes in and either tests good or winds up being unrepairable. We do not want you to send it to us unless we have a good shot at a successful repair.

We will await your reply to make sure we can attempt to repair your part. Please email with any questions. Thanks again for your business, we do appreciate it!

Subject: Re: your_part_source has sent a question about item #196432260499, ending on Apr-07-26 11:56:00 PDT - 14 RAM 1500 5.7L AT ECU ECM PCM ENGINE CONTROL COMPUTER 68153768AH PROBADA OEM
ItemTitle: 14 RAM 1500 5.7L AT ECU ECM PCM ENGINE CONTROL COMPUTER 68153768AH PROBADA OEM

Thread.Body:
Thanks again for purchasing our TIPM! 

WE STILL NEED YOUR VIN!! Message us back with your VIN as soon as possible or just follow the below instructions once the TIPM arrives.

DO NOT RELY ON eBay's GUARANTEED TO FIT PROGRAM! 

Be sure you did match the part number. As long as you do this, the TIPM is ready to configure to your vehicle. Perform the following steps to configure the TIPM to your vehicle:
1. Disconnect battery from vehicle. Remove your original TIPM and verify you purchased the correct part number. Do not worry about the letters, only the number. If a match, tie both battery cables together “away from the battery” while you are installing the new TIPM (roughly 20 minutes). This will erase all stored codes something that needs to happen during the configuration process.
2. Install TIPM. Make sure your fuse/relay set-up is identical to the original. Check to make sure all fuses are pushed in tight. We do this but just double check us.
3. Connect battery to vehicle
4. Turn key to ON position only (do not start vehicle) for 120 seconds, then turn off. If you have a “push button” start vehicle that also has a key slot, use the key slot, not the push button.
5. Start vehicle and please confirm all electrical features are working properly
6. If you run into any issues please hook up an OEM level scan tool to your OBD and pull the codes from the TIPM. You’ll also need to verify your VIN is in the replacement TIPM. Once you have this info, reach out to us. A code reader cannot read the TIPM, only an OEM level scan tool. Make sure to check your ground points for any corroded or broken wires. Also, if you are having A/C issues after install please make sure fuses J15 and K9 are not popped and are pushed in. If you run into a B2206 disconnect the battery then reconnect the battery then cycle the ignition switch from off to the on position at least 5 times, leaving the ignition on for a minimum of 90 seconds per cycle.

Thanks again for your business!

YPS

Thank you!
Please program ECU. Vin 1FTNE24L36DA21109 .  Miles 153784

Hello and thank you for your purchase, order 22-14440-49740

If you have already matched your part number and included your VIN and mileage in the "Notes to Seller" box during checkout, you do not have to resend that information.

We offer free VIN programming on the ECU purchased. If you would like to take advantage of this FREE service please email as soon as you can with your vehicle VIN.

If your vehicle has PATS security, your keys will need to be programmed to your new PCM once installed. Your vehicle will not start until this has been completed. BEFORE GOING ANY FURTHER PLEASE BE SURE TO HAVE 2 NON CLONED CHIPPED KEYS PRIOR TO INSTALL (CLONES WON”T WORK). IF YOU DO NOT HAVE THOSE READY YOU WILL NOT BE ABLE TO UPDATE THE PATS IN YOUR VEHICLE. If you have the two original keys with the Ford logo on them, you are good to go. If you only have one we would recommend getting the second key from a local locksmith as they are more affordable than going through a dealership. Just let them know you are replacing your PCM and you need a second non-cloned chipped key. Please make sure your locksmith/mechanic performs a PATS parameter reset, clears all of the existing keys and you have two working keys (no clones).

*We do not want to delay shipping your purchase so if we do not hear from you we assume the programming is being taken care of by your local locksmith or mechanic and we will ship the ECU. (Please make sure you are using the correct scan tool for programming or you could fry the computer and end up with a “no comm” situation.)

DO NOT RELY ON EBAY'S FITMENT GUIDE OR THE GUARANTEED TO FIT PROGRAM!

**WARNING: We only use your VIN information for programming purposes. We do not run VIN interchange for you. Please make sure you are purchasing the correct part.

🚘🚘🚘 PLEASE ALSO BE SURE THAT YOU HAVE MATCHED YOUR PART NUMBER AS THESE ARE PART NUMBER SPECIFIC NOT VEHICLE SPECIFIC. 🚘🚘🚘

We appreciate your business!


Your Part Source
